mnemonics: Servlets: Just Another Vast Extension Linking Technology & Servers - SERVLETS
keyPoints: Servlets are Java programs that run on a web server, handling client requests and generating dynamic responses.
They extend the capabilities of servers using the Java Servlet API.
The lifecycle is managed by the container: init(), service(), destroy().
commonMistakes: Not properly handling thread-safety issues in servlets.
Forgetting to call super() when overriding init() or doGet()/doPost() methods.
